articles.title: Save almost $200 on a flagship AMD 9850X3D CPU and 9070 XT GPU with this Newegg combo bundle — AMD's Ryzen 9 9850X3D and Radeon RX 9070 XT can be yours at a great price
articles.summary: If you've been looking to build a 4K-ready but the prices during the AI boom has scared you off, we've got just the deal to start you off. You can grab AMD's top-tier Ryzen 9 9850X3D CPU and RX 9070 XT GPU for less than $1,000 right now on Newegg. You're getting a combined savings of almost $200 across both items.
articles.title_zh: 在 Newegg 組合套餐中節省近 $200 購買旗艦 AMD 9850X3D CPU 和 9070 XT GPU — AMD 的 Ryzen 9 9850X3D 和 Radeon RX 9070 XT 現在價格優惠
articles.summary_zh: 如果你一直想組建 4K 準備電腦但被 AI 熱潮的價格嚇退，現在有個絕佳的交易。你可以在 Newegg 上以不到 $1,000 的價格購買 AMD 頂級 Ryzen 9 9850X3D CPU 和 RX 9070 XT GPU，組合節省近 $200。

articles.title: 007: First Light drops last-minute Denuvo DRM bombshell, leaving pre-order customers and fans furious — Bond title risks FPS drops and strict online check-ins, Pirates eagerly await repack as day-one cracks become the norm
articles.summary: IO Interative's latest James Bond adventure has been hit with the curse of Denuvo DRM, leaving many paying customers frustrated over a deliberate roadblock. With all versions of Denuvo now cracked anyways, there's a high chance 007: First Light will be cracked within a few days of its launch anyways.
articles.title_zh: 007: First Light 在最後一刻投下 Denuvo DRM 炸彈，預購客戶和粉絲憤怒 — 這部 Bond 大片面臨 FPS 下降和嚴格線上驗證的風險，盜版者已準備就緒
articles.summary_zh: IO Interactive 最新的詹姆斯龐德冒險遭到 Denuvo DRM 的困擾，許多付費客戶對這個刻意設置的障礙感到沮喪。由於所有版本的 Denuvo 都已被破解，007: First Light 在推出後幾天內極有可能被破解。

articles.title: iOS 27 to feature upgraded Camera interface and Photos app: Here’s what’s rumored
articles.summary: While many of the iOS 27 rumors have focused on Apple Intelligence, Siri, and performance – there’s a plethora of upgrades reportedly coming to the Camera app, building on top of the redesign that we saw last year with iOS 26. There’ll also be a number of new AI-enhanced editing tools coming to the Photos app. more…
articles.title_zh: iOS 27 將採用升級的 Camera 介面和 Photos 應用程式：以下是傳言的功能
articles.summary_zh: 除了 Apple Intelligence、Siri 和效能改進外，iOS 27 還傳聞將在 Camera 應用程式中帶來大量升級，並新增多項 AI 增強編輯工具。

articles.title: Apple registers new ‘gen AI’ subdomain ahead of next month’s WWDC keynote
articles.summary: Apple has just registered a new subdomain record ahead of WWDC: genai.apple.com. All signs point to WWDC 2026 being Apple’s major AI renaissance, where the company will live up to the promises it made back at WWDC 2024, as well as a few additional new announcements. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple 在下月 WWDC 主題演講前註冊新的 'gen AI' 子網域
articles.summary_zh: Apple 註冊了 genai.apple.com 新子網域，WWDC 2026 有望成為 Apple 的重大 AI 復興時刻，實現其在 WWDC 2024 的承諾並推出新功能。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘Poppy’ is a proactive AI assistant that handles what Siri still can’t
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . In a world full of AI assistants and tools that try to make your life easier, Poppy takes a different approach. Rather than requiring your effort up front, Poppy does its best to be proactive – and give you helpful context before you even know you need it. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用程式亮點：'Poppy' 是一個主動式 AI 助手，可處理 Siri 仍無法完成的任務
articles.summary_zh: Poppy 是一款獨立開發的 AI 助手應用程式，採用與眾不同的方式來簡化您的生活。

articles.title: Apple’s Focus filters are a great feature, but they have a glaring blind spot: group chats
articles.summary: Introduced in iOS 16, Focus Filters are excellent in premise. If you’re in say, a Work focus, you can block out distracting apps, websites, and notifications. It even works in Messages, where you’ll only see texts from people in your Work focus. There’s one caveat with its implementation in Messages though, and it makes it much less useful for me than it could be. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple 的焦點篩選是絕佳功能，但在群組聊天中存在明顯漏洞
articles.summary_zh: iOS 16 引入的焦點篩選概念優秀，但在 Messages 應用程式中的實作存在限制，特別是在群組聊天方面。

articles.title: These premium desk accessories completely upgraded my setup [Video]
articles.summary: Desk setups are ever evolving. Because so much of our workflow and desk revolves around tech, which changes constantly, the products we use every day naturally change alongside it. But one thing I’ve noticed over the years is that when I invest a little more in premium accessories, they tend to last much longer. There will always be a place for budget-conscious products, but the accessories I keep coming back to are usually well-built, thoughtfully designed, and that improve my overall workflow. I wanted to share some of my favorite premium desk accessories that would benefit anyone’s setup, whether for gaming, work, or leisure. more…
articles.title_zh: 這些高級辦公桌配件完全升級了我的設置 [視頻]
articles.summary_zh: 投資高級配件往往能提供更長的使用壽命，隨著工作流程和技術的不斷演變，辦公桌設置也需要相應更新。

articles.title: Gemini Live redesign now works with more ‘Connected Apps’ on Android
articles.summary: As part of the Neural Expressive redesign , Gemini Live on Android can now access more first- and third-party “Connected Apps.” more…
articles.title_zh: Gemini Live 重新設計現在在 Android 上支援更多「連接應用程式」
articles.summary_zh: 作為 Neural Expressive 重新設計的一部分，Android 上的 Gemini Live 現在可以存取更多第一方和第三方「連接應用程式」。

articles.title: You can turn off AI in Google Search results with this easy modifier
articles.summary: AI in Google Search can be useful, but it’s also one of those “love it or hate it” tools. If you’ve been wanting to turn AI Overviews in Google Search off, though, there’s a pretty easy way to do that. more…
articles.title_zh: 您可以使用此簡單修飾符在 Google Search 結果中關閉 AI
articles.summary_zh: Google Search 中的 AI Overviews 很有用但有褒貶不一的評價，現在有簡單方式可以關閉此功能。

articles.title: Weekly poll: which Android 17 features are you excited about?
articles.summary: Android 17 has been in beta for a while now, but Google keeps adding new features. If you haven’t been following along with all the announcements, you can watch the 90-second recap video below to get the highlights. There are longer videos with details on the core Android experience, Gemini Intelligence, Android Auto and, of course, the Googlebook. That’s a lot to take in – there are so many new features and new products! But did any of them get you excited – which ones? That’s what we want to find out this week. Some of these are overdue – Google touts that Instagram videos taken...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票：您對 Android 17 的哪些功能感到興奮？
articles.summary_zh: Android 17 已進行測試一段時間，Google 持續新增功能，您可以觀看 90 秒概要影片了解重點。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: Sony Xperia 1 VIII might be a hit, despite its high price
articles.summary: The results from last week’s poll have us wondering – do people really love the Sony Xperia 1 VIII so much or do they love phones with 3.5mm headphone jacks and microSD slots and the Xperia happens to be the only flagship to have those features? Because the results are quite positive – nearly a quarter of voters are willing to spend €1,500/£1,400 to get the Mark 8 and that is if they pick up the base 12/256GB unit. The 512GB and 1TB models cost more (€2,000/£1,850 in the case of the 1TB version). Interestingly, the positive vote could have gone higher, but Sony didn’t even launch the...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：Sony Xperia 1 VIII 儘管價格高昂但可能會大受歡迎
articles.summary_zh: 上週投票結果顯示極為正面，用戶可能對 Sony Xperia 1 VIII 擁有 3.5mm 耳機孔和 microSD 卡插槽感到滿意。

articles.title: Deals: OnePlus 15R paired with a free watch, Motorola Razr Fold and Razr 70 phones launch
articles.summary: This week the theme is “freebies” as several manufacturers pair phones with additional gadgets to try and draw in a crowd. We start with the OnePlus 15R, which comes with a free OnePlus Watch 3 43mm. And this is in addition to a €150 discount from its launch price. OnePlus 15R €150 offfree OnePlus Watch 3 43mm Read our review 12/256GB - €550 at Amazon DE 12/512GB - €650 at Amazon DE Next up, the Sony Xperia 1 VIII is on pre-order until June 19 –...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：OnePlus 15R 搭配免費手錶、Motorola Razr Fold 和 Razr 70 手機上市
articles.summary_zh: 本週多家製造商推出搭售優惠，OnePlus 15R 贈送免費 OnePlus Watch 3 43mm 並享有 €150 折扣。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy A57 vs. Galaxy A56
articles.summary: If you are in the market for a mid-range smartphone, it's almost impossible not to stumble upon Samsung's Galaxy A lineup. But with the recent Samsung Galaxy A57 release, one would wonder whether the Samsung Galaxy A56 isn't actually a more sensible solution, seeing the somewhat modest hardware upgrade. After all, last year's Galaxy A56 is still relevant and sells at a lower price. Since the more recent Galaxy offers only minor design changes and a newer chipset, it's probably safe to assume that the Galaxy A56 will get you a lot of the way while saving you a few bucks. But even trivial...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy A57 對比 Galaxy A56
articles.summary_zh: 隨著 Samsung Galaxy A57 發布，消費者可能會質疑 Galaxy A56 是否仍是更明智的選擇，考慮到其硬體升級相對溫和。

articles.title: Apple's sleep apnea notifications and hearing test features are now available in India
articles.summary: Apple has announced the expansion of sleep apnea notifications and hearing test features to India. Sleep apnea is a condition in which a person's breathing momentarily stops during sleep, preventing the body from getting enough oxygen. If left untreated, it can lead to health consequences over time, including increased risk of hypertension, type 2 diabetes, and cardiac issues. Apple Watch helps its users detect signs of sleep apnea. It's done with the help of an Apple Watch metric called Breathing Disturbances, which uses the smartwatch's accelerometer to detect small movements at the...
articles.title_zh: Apple 的睡眠呼吸暫停通知和聽力測試功能現已在印度上市
articles.summary_zh: Apple 宣布將睡眠呼吸暫停通知和聽力測試功能擴展至印度，睡眠呼吸暫停症是一種在睡眠期間呼吸暫時停止的疾病。

articles.title: Xiaomi gives us our best official look yet at the 17T, reveals magnification of 17T series' telephoto cameras
articles.summary: The Xiaomi 17T and Xiaomi 17T Pro will be unveiled on May 28, followed by the 17T's launch in India on June 4. Xiaomi already revealed the rear designs of the 17T and 17T Pro, and now its Indian branch has given us our best official look yet at the non-Pro model through a video clip on X. The video, included in the X post embedded below, shows the 17T in the same color as before but reveals that the smartphone will pack a display with a centered punch hole for the selfie camera, corroborating previous design leaks. Turn heads with every shot.The all-new #Xiaomi17T is co-engineered with...
articles.title_zh: Xiaomi 為我們提供迄今最佳的 17T 官方展示，揭示 17T 系列長焦相機的放大倍率
articles.summary_zh: Xiaomi 17T 和 17T Pro 將於 5 月 28 日發布，17T 將於 6 月 4 日在印度上市，Xiaomi 印度分公司已透過 X 影片展示非 Pro 版本的設計。

articles.title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
articles.summary: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.
articles.title_zh: Ferrari 使用 IBM 的 AI 技術打造 F1 超級粉絲
articles.summary_zh: IBM 和 Scuderia Ferrari HP 向 TechCrunch 展示他們如何重新定義車迷體驗。

articles.title: OpenClaw passed 300,000 GitHub stars. Then Google launched Spark.
articles.summary: OpenClaw made the always-on agent feel personal by making it live somewhere you could point at — a Mac mini on a shelf, drawing seven watts, running while you sleep. Peter Steinberger’s open-source project surpassed 300,000 GitHub stars by April and became one of the fastest-growing repositories on GitHub. The whole appeal was ownership: your hardware, your credentials, your lobster. On Tuesday at I/O, Google launched Gemini Spark , and it makes the opposite bet. Spark is a 24/7 personal agent built on Gemini 3.5 Flash and connected to Google’s Antigravity agent stack. It runs in the background on virtual machines on Google Cloud. You never see the machine. Google plans to let you text and email the agent directly, so it works while your laptop is shut. The split is about
articles.title_zh: OpenClaw 突破 300,000 GitHub 星標，隨後 Google 推出 Spark
articles.summary_zh: OpenClaw 透過在 Mac mini 上運行（功耗僅七瓦，可持續全天運行）使 always-on agent 更具個人化，Peter Steinberger 的開源項目在 4 月份超過 300,000 個 GitHub 星標，成為增長最快的儲存庫之一。

articles.title: Best Power Banks (2026): My Picks After Testing Over 100
articles.summary: Keep your phone, laptop, handheld gaming console, and other electronics running with these travel-friendly power banks.
articles.title_zh: 最佳行動電源(2026)：我測試超過100款後的精選推薦
articles.summary_zh: 這些便攜式行動電源可讓你的手機、筆記型電腦、掌上型遊戲機和其他電子設備在旅途中持續運行。

articles.title: Hyperscaler Debt Flood Brings Derivatives Bonanza
articles.summary: As big tech companies raise hundreds of billions of dollars to fund artificial intelligence investments, Wall Street banks are increasingly finding they have to trade more credit derivatives to keep doing business with the hyperscalers.
articles.title_zh: 超大規模數據中心債務激增帶來衍生品繁榮
articles.summary_zh: 隨著大型科技公司籌集數千億美元資金用於人工智能投資，華爾街銀行發現需要交易更多信用衍生品才能繼續與超大規模數據中心廠商開展業務。

articles.title: SpaceX's Starship V3—still a work in progress—mostly successful on first flight
articles.summary: SpaceX launched the first test flight of its upgraded Starship rocket and Super Heavy booster Friday, with mostly positive results. The powerful rocket, propelled by 33 methane-fueled main engines, climbed away from SpaceX's Starbase launch facility in South Texas at 5:30 pm CDT (6:30 pm EDT; 22:30 UTC) Friday. Within a few seconds, the 408-foot-tall (124-meter) rocket, the largest ever built, cleared the launch tower and turned onto an eastward heading over the Gulf of Mexico. Starship splashed down on target in the Indian Ocean a little more than an hour later to conclude the first flight of the latest version of SpaceX's stainless steel mega-rocket. Starship V3 fared better on its debut than the first flights of Starship V1 and V2 in 2023 and 2025 . Both past versions of Starship broke
articles.title_zh: SpaceX Starship V3—仍在開發中—首次飛行基本成功
articles.summary_zh: SpaceX 上週五成功進行了升級版 Starship 火箭和 Super Heavy 推進器的首次測試飛行，整體結果積極向好。這枚由33台甲烷燃料主引擎推動的強大火箭從德州南部的 SpaceX Starbase 發射設施於美國中部時間下午5:30升空。
